nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 5am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. Low around 64, with temperatures rising to around 68 overnight. Southeast wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
